title: Listening - Part 3
instructions: Complete the notes with a word or short phrase.

content.speaker: Daniel
content.audio_script:
Hello everyone. My name’s Daniel, and today I’m going to tell you about a school travel project.

The project first started at the [1]train station[/1], where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on [2]travel journal[/2], because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring [3]group activities[/3] or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby [4]mountain hotel[/4] together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an [5]Sunday afternoon[/5], which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is [6]different cultures[/6], because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.

dialogue.speaker: daniel
dialogue.text:
Hello everyone. My name’s Daniel, and today I’m going to tell you about a school travel project.

The project first started at the train station, where a group of students wanted to learn something new after school. 
At first, only a few people joined, but more students became interested very quickly.

We usually meet on travel journal, because that’s when most people are free. 
Everyone is encouraged to bring group activities or any equipment they already have at home.

During breaks, students often visit the nearby mountain hotel together to relax and chat. 
At the end of the course, all participants can share their work in an Sunday afternoon, which friends and family can visit.

Personally, I think the best part of the experience is different cultures, because it helps students become more confident and creative.

Thanks for listening.
